name: Stuffed Sole
recipeIngredient: 8 sole or flounder fillets (2 to 2-1/2 pounds total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté onion until tender.
2. Add shrimp and cook until shrimp are pink. Stir in crab meat and heat through.
3. Season fillets with salt, pepper and paprika.
4. Spoon the crab mixture onto each fillet. Roll up and secure with toothpicks.
5. Place rolls seam-side down in a greased 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
6. Mix together soup, broth and water until smooth. Pour over fish.
7. Sprinkle cheese on top. Cover and bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with parsley and return to oven uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until fish flakes easily.
9. Serve over rice if desired.
